title: How to find the most frequent number in a range
task: Get the value that appears most often — the statistical mode.

excel.note: MODE.MULT returns ALL tied modes as a spill; legacy =MODE() still works.

explanation: MODE.SNGL returns the single most frequent number — 2 appears three times here. With a tie it returns whichever mode occurs first, which is why MODE.MULT (spilling every tied value) exists. These only work on numbers; for the most frequent TEXT value use =INDEX(A2:A6,MATCH(MAX(COUNTIF(A2:A6,A2:A6)),COUNTIF(A2:A6,A2:A6),0)) — or UNIQUE+COUNTIF sorting in modern versions.
